titleStmt.title: SII 23.288: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 288. (A.R. No. 288 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—in the same place Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: year 16: 1193-94 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription begins with the introduction Puyal vāyttu etc. and is dated in the 59th day of the year quoted. It registers an order of the king issued on the representation of Vāṇādhirājan, to the effect that the procession of the god on festival days was in future to start from the eastern entrance of the temple, instead of from the southern as hitherto; that a new road called Rājākkaḷ Tambirāṉ-tiruvīdi was to be laid out (running east) from the temple for the purpose; that the land which was to be covered by this road and which now formed part of the palace grounds, was to be alienated (in favour of the temple); that the main gateway of the palace was to be constructed on the north wing of the new road; and that the area of residential buildings on the south side of the southern road was to be acquired for conversion into a flower garden and orchard for the temple. Six signatories headed by Mīnavaṉ-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ the Tirumandiravōlai (Royal Secretary) have attested this document at the end.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . puyalvāyttu vaḷamperuka poyyāta nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyalvāyppa tirumakaḷuñ jayamakaḷuñ ciṟaṉtuvāḻa veṇmatipoṟ kuṭaiviḷaṅka velveṉta raṭivaṇaṅka maṇmaṭantai manaṅkaḷippa manu niti taḻaittoṅkac cakkaramuñ ceṅkoluṉ tikkaṉaittuñ cel naṭatta kaṟpakālam puvikāppa poṟpamaitta muṭi puṉaintu vāḻa veṅkaiyu maṭamānum vaṉtorutuṟai niruṇṇa poṉ veṅkai koṭi yuyarttuk ko vartaṅ koṭi paṇiyac cuṅkam palarccera nāṭu coṟṟumalai kaṇṭaruḷa teṉṉavar vantaṭipaṇiya
cciṅkaḷavaṉ vaṉtalai Ariyat teṉṉiḻaṅ koḷkaveṉṉat tiraikaṭalai Aṭaikkaveṉṉap poṉṉicūḻ nāṭeṅkum pormakaḷir kāvalarum nāṟtikaiyuṅ kāval pūṇṭu cevalaru neṭuṅkoṭiyāḷa tirukkayilaic civanaruḷāl mevalaraic catamaṭakki veṟṟimiku ventaṉ palluyi rātāyāy taṉicciṅka mivaṉeṉ mācenar kaliparantoṭat tecamel lām viḷaṅkukaveṉap pormaṉṉar tam muṭi puṉaintu cempoṉ virasiṁhāsaṉattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kop carakecaripaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭi yaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ ko
ṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulattuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 10 6Āvatu ḷ 5 10 9 ṉāl prasādañ ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi tiripuvaṉaccakkaravartti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyiṟ patipātamulap paṭṭuṭaip pañcācāri yat tevarkaṉmikkum śrī māheśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrī kāriyañ ceyvāṉukkum Ittevar tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷumiṭattu teṟkil tiruvācal muṉpu Eḻuntaruḷippuṟappaṭṭu Eḻuntaruḷi varukiṟapaṭi tavirak kiḻakku nokki Eḻuntaruḷip puṟappaṭṭut tiruvitiyil Eḻuntaruḷa vum Ippaṭi ceyyumiṭattup putitākac ceykiṟa Irācākkaḷtampirāṉ
tiruvitikkuṭalāka Ivvūril nam viṭṭuk kaṭṭaṇantu vaḻiyoḻuṅku kaṭṭaṇamāṉa Iṭattile teṟkaṭaiya veṇṭumiṭam nam viṭṭuk kaṭṭaṇattukku Uṭalāy varukiṟapaṭi tavirntu tiruvitikkuṭalākap peṟṟuk kiḻait tiruvitiyile yuṟat tiruvitiyākac ceyyavum It tiruvitiyil vaṭaciṟakile nam viṭṭuk kaṭṭaṇattukkut talaivācal ceyyavum teṟkil tiruvitikkut teṟkup palaṟkum kuṭiyiruppāy varukiṟa Iṭam Ivarkaḷukku kuṭiyiruppāy varukiṟapaṭi tavirntu tiru ṉantavaṉamun toppumākac ceyyavuṅ kaṭavutākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu vāṇādhirājaṉ ṉamakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatākac coṉṉom
nam viṭṭuk kaṭṭaṇattu vaḻiyoḻuṅku kaṭṭaṇamāṉa Iṭattil teṟ kaṭaiya veṇṭumiṭaṅ kaikkoṇṭu tiruvitiyāka ceyya veṇṭumiṭañ ceyyavum It tiruviti vaṭaciṟakil nam viṭṭuk kaṭṭaṇattukkut talaivācal ceytukoḷḷavum teṟkil tiruvitikkut teṟkup palaruṅ kuṭiyiruppāy varukiṟa Iṭan tirunantavaṉamun tiruntoppumākac ceyyavum paṇṇuka Eḻutinān tirumantira Olai miṉavaṉ muveṉta veḷā ṉeḻuttuk kurukularāyarum viḻiñattarayarum pūlokapurantarap pallavarayarum vaṉṉāṭuṭaiyārum cetikularāyarum Eḻuttiṭṭu prasādañ ceytaruḷi pontatu ḷa
Digital edition of SII 23.288 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
